info.title: SDKWork Canvas Backend API
info.description: Backend/admin authority skeleton for SDKWork Canvas governance, diagnostics, projection repair, and operational jobs. Drive provider, quota, object, upload session, and version retention administration remains owned by Drive backend APIs.

get.summary: List Notes workspaces for backend-admin governance.

post.summary: Queue a projection rebuild for a Notes workspace.

get.summary: List Notes index and projection jobs.

post.summary: Create an index or projection job.

get.summary: Retrieve an index or projection job.
List AI jobs for backend-admin review.

post.summary: Cancel a running AI job through backend-admin controls.

get.summary: List Notes metadata records with missing or inconsistent Drive bindings.

post.summary: Queue repair for Notes metadata records with inconsistent Drive bindings.
Claim a queued AI job for backend worker execution.
Complete a running AI job and persist reviewable suggestions.
Accept an AI suggestion through backend-admin controls.
Reject an AI suggestion through backend-admin controls.
Apply an accepted AI suggestion through backend-admin controls.

200.description: Applied AI suggestion page content result.

get.summary: List AI suggestion feedback for backend-admin quality review.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md §15.3.
